title: Opening for Production Engineer at Charak Pharma

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Charak Pharma
jsonLd.description:
Charak Pharma has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Charak Pharma:
Charak Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Charak Pharma!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
